user_query: I'm planning a surprise vacation for my partner and I need some travel tips. Can you fetch some messages from the 'Travel' category to get some destination ideas? Additionally, I would like to know the number of reply messages sent on the day we book our flights.

TaskList.description: Fetch messages from the 'Travel' category to gather destination ideas.
Determine the number of reply messages sent on the day the flights are booked.
